presence_results.note_evidence: Mr. Isreal Howell is an 85-year-old man presenting for his annual comprehensive examination. He reports feeling well.
presence_results.rationale: Age, annual exam, and feeling well all stated.

presence_results.note_evidence: He denies chest pain or pressure at rest or with usual exertion, noting only an occasional brief twinge with heavy yard work that resolves promptly with rest
presence_results.rationale: Denial of angina with exertional twinge resolving with rest matches.

presence_results.note_evidence: he has not needed his nitroglycerin spray in many months
presence_results.rationale: Directly stated.

presence_results.note_evidence: He denies exertional dyspnea, orthopnea, paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnea, palpitations, lower-extremity edema
presence_results.rationale: Dyspnea, PND, and edema denials present.

presence_results.note_evidence: lightheadedness, syncope, and falls over the past year
presence_results.rationale: Denial of dizziness/lightheadedness and falls stated.

presence_results.note_evidence: Appetite is preserved and weight is stable to slightly down.
presence_results.rationale: Appetite good and weight steady captured.

presence_results.note_evidence: He retired from a sixty-year bookkeeping career this June ... Not in labor force newly documented following retirement this year.
presence_results.rationale: Retirement in June after 60-year career and out of labor force stated.

presence_results.note_evidence: he lives with his daughter and grandson (three in the household)
presence_results.rationale: Household composition matches.

presence_results.note_evidence: denies difficulty affording food, medications, or transportation
presence_results.rationale: No unmet financial needs stated.
No PRAPARE details, insurance, housing, contact frequency, or stress level documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: Medication reconciliation performed with his pill bottles
presence_results.rationale: Reconciliation with pill bottles stated.
